The Problem

YOU'RE NOT
AVERAGE.
YOUR SYSTEM IS.

You show up. You put in the reps. But without precise structure, dialled-in nutrition, and someone holding you to a real standard — you plateau. Every time.

Most intermediate gym-goers are stuck in the same loop: train hard, eat inconsistently, make slow progress, wonder why. The effort is real. The system is not.

  • Training without a programme built for your body and your goals
  • Nutrition that's "mostly okay" but never precise enough to move the needle
  • No external accountability — which means slippage you don't even notice
  • Knowledge gaps you didn't know you had until you stopped progressing
THE GAP BETWEEN WHERE YOU ARE AND WHERE YOU WANT TO BE IS CLOSED BY DOING MORE.

Plus 4 reps. Plus 4 percent effort. Plus 4 points of discipline. Every single day. That's not a slogan — that's the philosophy this entire coaching system was built on.

The System

EVERYTHING
YOU NEED.
NOTHING
YOU DON'T.

All coaching is delivered through the Plus 4 Performance app. No scattered spreadsheets, no generic plans, no guesswork. One elite system, built around you.

01
▲

Bespoke Training

A programme built for your schedule, equipment, and goals. Progressive overload structured to actually work — not just fill a template.

02
◆

Precision Nutrition

Whether you're cutting, building, or recomping — your calories, macros, and strategy are built for your targets, your life, and your results.

03
●

Real Accountability

Weekly check-ins. Direct coach access. Real-time adjustments based on your data. You will never be left guessing.

04
■

Education First

We don't just tell you what to do. We tell you why. Understanding the science builds habits that outlast any programme.

05
✦

Progress Tracking

Log lifts, bodyweight, measurements, and performance scores inside the app. Data doesn't lie — and neither do we.

06
⬡

Mindset Standards

Elite physique starts with elite habits of mind. We build the mental framework to keep you consistent when motivation runs out.

Training Experience
ES
Ethan
Head Coach · Strength, Bodybuilding & Lifestyle
With 5+ years of dedicated training behind him, Ethan brings a rare combination of competitive bodybuilding knowledge and real-world lifestyle coaching. He's built his own physique through the same principles he coaches — progressive structure, dialled-in nutrition, and an uncompromising standard of effort. His specialism is helping clients achieve a lean, powerful physique without sacrificing the life they want to live.
